scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-aulas-backend && npm install --prefix mobile-app
scripts.run:all: concurrently -n backend,mobile -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix api-aulas-backend" "npm run web --prefix mobile-app"
scripts.run:all:native: concurrently -n backend,mobile -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix api-aulas-backend" "npm run start --prefix mobile-app"
